subject.title: Mathematics Applications & Interpretation (AI)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics: Applications and Interpretation** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **real-world applications of mathematics, statistical analysis, mathematical modeling, and data interpretation**, with a strong focus on **technology use, practical problem-solving, and interpreting mathematical results in context**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | External examination (calculator permitted) | 1h 30min | 2h | SL: 40%, HL: 30% |
| **Paper 2** | External examination (technology required) | 1h 30min | 2h | SL: 40%, HL: 30% |
| **Paper 3** | External examination (technology required) | N/A | 1h | HL: 20% |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal assessment | 30h | 30h | 20% |

strengths: Clear sectional structure with labelled headings, aiding reader navigation
Logical progression from data collection through analysis to conclusion
Specific and informative title and a comprehensive data table for all 50 states
weaknesses: Repetitive narrative and inflated autobiography reduce conciseness
Table of Contents lacks page numbers, hindering navigability
Axes in graphs are unlabeled and units missing, limiting clarity
Minor formatting glitches interrupt the otherwise coherent flow
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exploration is coherent and organized into clear sections, with a strong title and contents page. However, unnecessary narrative detail and missing navigational elements prevent a more concise and seamless presentation. These factors place the work solidly at a bandâ2 level for Presentation.

strengths: Effective use of a scatterplot and multiple tables to represent the data visually and numerically
Clear explanation of bivariate variables (xÂ², yÂ², xy) in the correlation calculation
weaknesses: Inconsistent mathematical notation: subscripts and Greek letters are mis-typed or embedded in prose
Misaligned table headers and stray characters undermine precision
Equations and formulae are poorly formatted, affecting readability and consistency
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: While multiple representations are used effectively and key statistical notation appears, inconsistencies in formatting and notation errors limit clarity and precision. These issues constrain the work to bandâ2 for Mathematical Communication.

strengths: Personal anecdote provides clear motivation and personal approach to the topic
Selection of an original social issue and addition of a follow-up t-test demonstrate initiative
weaknesses: Mathematical methods remain largely standard, limiting evidence of outstanding independent thinking
Creativity is present but does not consistently extend beyond typical investigation steps
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The student shows a clear personal approach and notable initiative in extending the topic with a t-test, but the mathematics itself follows conventional procedures. This aligns with a bandâ2 rating for Personal Engagement.

strengths: Reflection acknowledges data validity through cross-method verification
Brief recognition of a timing limitation adds some critical perspective
weaknesses: Reflection is superficial, focusing on only one limitation
Critical analysis is minimal, with little exploration of potential confounding variables
Connections to deeper understanding are only briefly stated
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The student offers some reflection on methodology and a single limitation, but critical analysis and deeper connections to understanding are limited. The work therefore meets only the basic criteria for bandâ1 Reflection.

strengths: Appropriate choice of Pearsonâs r and t-test methods at SL course level
Correct interpretation of t and p values with linkage back to hypotheses
Verification of results across manual, Excel, and calculator methods shows procedural rigor
weaknesses: Multiple calculation errors (e.g., Î£xy mis-sum, incorrect t-value copying) reduce accuracy
Procedural details are omitted (e.g., significance level, degrees of freedom formula, outlier bounds)
Conceptual misstatement of Pearsonâs r range and missing intermediate calculation steps
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exploration employs relevant SL mathematics and demonstrates conceptual understanding in parts, but pervasive numerical inaccuracies and gaps in procedural detail limit correctness and rigour. These shortcomings place the work at bandâ2 for Use of Mathematics.

strandSelections.reasoning: Choosing an original social topic and deciding to add a follow-up t-test shows noticeable independent thought beyond a template investigation, though the mathematics remains standard.  This meets âsignificant evidenceâ rather than âoutstandingâ.

Explanations of why Pearsonâs r and a t-test are chosen, plus a reasonable interpretation of results, show good conceptual understanding in parts, though not rigorous throughout.  Band 3 therefore reflects the level shown.

Several numerical inaccuracies (e.g., incorrect Î£xy total, minor rounding issues, possible mis-copy of t-value) mean the mathematics is only partially correct.  Hence âpartially correctâ (band 2) is most fitting.

Much of the writing is relevant, yet the opening autobiography and repeated explanations inflate the word-count.  Occasional duplication (e.g. reiterating formulae) and extraneous narrative lower conciseness, so the strand fits the âmostly relevant with some unnecessary elementsâ description.

Basic statistical notation (r, Hâ, Hâ, xÌ, S) is used, but several symbols are mis-typed or embedded in prose rather than mathematical form, and sub-scripts/Greek letters are sometimes replaced by plain text.  Thus appropriate language is present but not consistently accurate.

Explanations of procedures are generally clear, yet formatting problems (misaligned equations, hanging symbols) create inconsistency.  The narrative can still be followed, so clarity is mostly achieved, but not with the consistency demanded by the higher bands.

Correlation coefficients and two-sample t-tests are squarely within the SL syllabus and are applied in context, so relevant mathematics at course level is used.  The methods are appropriate though not sophisticated enough for higher bands.

The student provides a scatterplot, two comparative tables and a bivariate data table, employing multiple representations effectively to illuminate the relationship.  While the graph lacks a regression line and axis labels could be clearer, the overall use is definitely effective rather than merely âsomeâ.
Reflection is confined mainly to acknowledging the weak correlation and a single timing limitation.  This limited commentary fulfils the minimum requirement for reflection but lacks depth.
Initiative is shown in compiling a 50-state data set and supplementing correlation with hypothesis testing.  Creativity is reasonable but not exceptional, so the middle band fits best.

The exploration is structured in clear sections (introduction, data, mathematics, conclusion) and ideas progress logically from data collection to analysis.  Although some explanations ramble, the overall argument about testing correlation then moving to a t-test is easy to follow, so coherence is solid rather than exceptional.

Critical analysis is basic: the student simply accepts the null hypothesis and notes one methodological flaw without probing its quantitative impact.  This aligns with âbasic analysis with limited critique.â
While the student states that the findings weaken their prediction, the piece only briefly connects outcomes to understanding of the topic.  The connection is evident but limited, fitting band 1.

A contents page, labelled headings, and numbered tables/figures show purposeful organisation.  Each stage (data â scatterplot â calculations â conclusion) is separated cleanly, giving the reader a clear path.  Minor formatting glitches prevent a seamless flow, keeping it at a good but not exemplary level.

The studentâs personal narrative about family experience and the selection of U.S. state data give the work a clear personal stamp that guides the exploration, satisfying the descriptor of a âclear personal approachâ.

annotations.comment: Consider reducing narrative detail to increase conciseness and maintain focus on the mathematical inquiry.
Specify the chosen significance level (Î±) here to fully detail the hypothesis-testing procedure in your plan.
Data table comprehensively lists all 50 states, ensuring a robust sample size and supporting generalizable conclusions.
The title âINVESTIGATING THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN CHILD ABUSE RATES AND TEEN PREGNANCY RATES IN 2018â is clear and specific, effectively establishing the explorationâs focus.
Table of Contents lists sections clearly and provides logical navigation through the exploration.
Suggest adding corresponding page numbers to each entry to improve navigability and coherence.
Personal anecdote engages the reader and demonstrates a clear personal approach driving the investigation.
The plan outlines precise variables (x, y) and a clear sequence of statistical methods, showing good understanding of relevant mathematics.
The axes lack clear labels and units; add descriptive axis titles and consider plotting a regression line to enhance clarity.
When calculating outliers, include both lower and upper bounds and annotate units to fully demonstrate the method and result.
The explanation of the bivariate table and variables xÂ², yÂ², and xy shows effective use of mathematical language and clarity.
The table header cells appear misaligned; ensure proper formatting so that column labels correspond clearly with data.
Inclusion of a scatterplot effectively represents the data visually, aiding multiple representations.
Selecting only the highest and lowest 8 states could introduce bias; consider using random or quartile-based grouping for a more representative T-test sample.
Clarify captions by specifying whether the table shows the top or bottom 8 states to avoid reader confusion.
The stray characters â9yâ undermine precision; proofread to remove typographical errors in hypothesis statements.
The degrees of freedom formula is incorrectly stated; use Î½ = nâ + nâ â 2 and calculate appropriately for clarity.
The standard deviation calculation steps lack explanation of intermediate sums; include detail on computed squared deviations for transparency.
Specify whether t-critical is one-tailed or two-tailed and cite the appropriate table to justify the choice.
The conclusion correctly interprets t and p values and links back to Hâ, demonstrating accurate statistical reasoning.
The reflection on data validity through cross-method verification shows reflective depth and reinforces result reliability.
Extend the critical reflection by discussing other potential confounding variables that might influence teen pregnancy rates beyond child abuse.
The summary Î£xy value seems incorrect; recalculate with careful summation to ensure accurate Pearsonâs r computation.
The description states r ranges from 0 to 1, but Pearsonâs r spans â1 to 1; revise to correct the conceptual range.
Format each step of the correlation formula using proper LaTeX display to improve mathematical communication and readability.
Verifying results across manual, Excel, and calculator methods demonstrates rigor and thorough understanding of mathematical procedures.
Concluding statements are concise but could be improved by summarizing key limitations and suggestions for future investigation in a final paragraph.
References lack access dates and authors; follow a consistent citation style to enhance the credibility and presentation.
Include additional scholarly sources beyond websites to strengthen literature support and reflect thorough research.
